title: BEM-777 route queue verify
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 19:50 (UTC+3)'
def load(path):
    p=Path(path)
    if not p.exists(): return {}
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(encoding='utf-8', errors='ignore'))
    except: return {}
prev=load('governance/state/bem776_verify_codex_dispatch_queue_result.json')
prev_status=prev.get('status','unknown')
if prev_status=='claude_response_found_after_queue_dispatch':
    status='route_process_real_claude_response'
    next_action='process real Claude response and prepare agreed protocol'
    blocker=None
elif prev_status=='queue_dispatch_runtime_seen_no_response':
    status='route_diagnose_claude_runtime_outcome'
    next_action='diagnose Claude Action/provider outcome without exposing secrets, then retry real response'
    blocker={'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_NO_RESPONSE','previous_status':prev_status,'outcome':prev.get('claude_outcome')}
elif prev_status=='queue_result_seen_but_no_runtime':
    status='route_patch_dispatcher_from_queue_result'
    next_action='read queue result and patch dispatcher according to exact failure'
    blocker={'code':'QUEUE_RESULT_NO_RUNTIME','dispatch_results_found':prev.get('dispatch_results_found')}
else:
    status='route_patch_queue_consumer_or_force_queue_tick'
    next_action='verify codex-runner queue consumer and force queue processing without operator relay'
    blocker={'code':'QUEUE_DISPATCH_NOT_PROCESSED','previous_status':prev_status,'queue_file_exists':prev.get('queue_file_exists')}
pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem777_execute_next_queue_route.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-777 Execute Next Queue Route'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Route: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-777 ROUTE AFTER QUEUE VERIFY'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Route: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay: forbidden.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'route_after_queue_dispatch_verify.v1','bem':'BEM-777','status':status,'previous_status':prev_status,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem777_route_after_queue_dispatch_verify.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem777_route_after_queue_dispatch_verify.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-777 | Route After Queue Dispatch Verify | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Previous: '+prev_status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem777_route_after_queue_dispatch_verify','status':status,'previous_status':prev_status,'next_action':next_action,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem777_route_after_queue_dispatch_verify.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-777 '+status+' previous='+prev_status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-776 queue dispatch verification and created next active queue repair task')
"""
